stories.title: **Headline:** Wells at 36 HRs Enters SEC Tournament — One From Tying the All-Time NCAA Record

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells: 36 home runs. Regular season: over.

The all-time NCAA record (37, Lauren Espinoza, Arizona, 1995) is ONE home run away from being tied.

She gets the SEC Tournament starting Thursday. History is waiting in Lexington. 🥎 #Sooners #SECSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Lauren Espinoza set the NCAA single-season HR record in 1995. It has survived 31 seasons.

Kendall Wells needs ONE MORE to tie it.

She enters the SEC Tournament on Thursday as the most dangerous hitter in college softball. #Sooners #SECSoftball

article.headline: Kendall Wells Enters SEC Tournament at 36 HRs — One From Tying the All-Time NCAA Record

- **Mood:** Intense, record-chase anticipation

#### Image Concept 2 — Article Hero (1200x630)
- **Type:** imagn

stories.title: **Headline:** SEC Tournament Opens Tuesday — Full Bracket Preview, Double Byes for OU, Alabama, Florida, Texas

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
The 2026 SEC Softball Tournament starts TOMORROW in Lexington, KY.

Double-bye teams waiting Thursday:
🥎 No. 1 Oklahoma (20-4)
🥎 No. 2 Alabama (19-5)
🥎 No. 3 Florida (17-7)
🥎 No. 4 Texas (16-8)

This bracket is stacked. #SECSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
SEC Tournament field has four teams that could win it all. Oklahoma is No. 1 but Alabama, Florida, and Texas all have the talent to make a run.

Games start Tuesday. OU doesn't play until Thursday. Selection Show: May 10. #SECSoftball

article.headline: 2026 SEC Softball Tournament Preview — Bracket, Schedule, and What to Watch

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
SEC Tournament Preview

#### Image Concept 1 — Social (1080x1350)
- **Type:** gemini
- **Mode:** base_only
- **Prompt:** Aerial cinematic view of a softball stadium at sunset, bright diamond field, tournament atmosphere with colorful crowds, SEC branding space, dramatic sky with warm orange and deep blue tones
- **Caption overlay:** "SEC TOURNAMENT — MAY 5 | LEXINGTON, KY"

#### Image Concept 2 — Article Hero (1200x630)
- **Type:** gemini
- **Mode:** complete
- **Prompt:** Dynamic tournament bracket graphic with SEC softball theme, four double-bye seeds highlighted (Oklahoma, Alabama, Florida, Texas), bold SEC blue and gold color palette, stadium silhouette background, championship trophy graphic

stories.title: **Headline:** Nebraska Enters Big Ten Tournament as No. 1 Seed — Program's First Outright Big Ten Title

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Nebraska won the Big Ten regular season title OUTRIGHT — first time in program history.

42-6. 22-1 in conference. No. 1 seed at the Big Ten Tournament (May 6-9, College Park, MD).

The Huskers are for real. 🌽 #Huskers #BigTenSoftball

article.headline: Nebraska Enters Big Ten Tournament as No. 1 Seed — Chasing a National Seed and WCWS Glory

stories.title: **Headline:** Texas Tech 50-4, No. 1 Seed — NiJaree Canady and Red Raiders Enter Big 12 Tournament on Historic High

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
NiJaree Canady's Senior Day: perfect game, 9 Ks, 62 pitches, 8-0 run-rule vs. Baylor.

Texas Tech enters the Big 12 Tournament (May 7-9, Devon Park OKC) as the No. 1 seed at 50-4.

Canady isn't done yet. #WreckEm #Big12Softball

stories.title: **Headline:** No. 1 FSU Enters ACC Tournament — Seminoles Seeking First Tournament Title Since 2022

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
No. 1 Florida State (45-8, 20-3 ACC) heads to Charlottesville as the top seed in the ACC Tournament (May 6-9, Palmer Park).

A title this week could lock in a national seed for the Seminoles. #FSUSoftball #ACCSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Conference Tournament Week Is Here — When, Where, and Who to Watch

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Conference tournament week starts TOMORROW. Full schedule:

📍 SEC: May 5-9 — Lexington, KY
📍 Big Ten: May 6-9 — College Park, MD
📍 ACC: May 6-9 — Charlottesville, VA
📍 Big 12: May 7-9 — OKC

Selection Show: May 10, 7 PM ET ESPN2 🥎

stories.title: **Headline:** 24 Days to the WCWS — Devon Park Awaits

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
24 days until the WCWS opens at Devon Park in Oklahoma City.

Conference tournaments begin this week. Selection Show: May 10.

Projected top seeds: OU, Texas Tech, Nebraska.

The stretch run starts NOW. 🥎
